fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item that this value entry is linked to.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date of this entry.

fields.name: Item Ledger Entry Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of item ledger entry that caused this value entry.

fields.name: Source No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the source document that the entry originates from.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number of the entry.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the entry.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the location of the item that the entry is linked to.

fields.name: Source Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting group for the item, customer, or vendor for the item entry that this value entry is linked to.

fields.name: Item Ledger Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item ledger entry that this value entry is linked to.

fields.name: Valued Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that the adjusted cost and the amount of the entry belongs to.

fields.name: Item Ledger Entry Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the average cost calculation.

fields.name: Invoiced Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item are invoiced by the posting that the value entry line represents.

fields.name: Cost per Unit
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost for one base unit of the item in the entry.

fields.name: Sales Amount (Actual)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price of the item for a sales entry.

fields.name: SIFT Bucket No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies an automatically generated number that is used by the system to enable better concurrency.

fields.name: Salespers./Purch. Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which salesperson or purchaser is linked to the entry.

fields.name: Discount Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total discount amount of this value entry.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source code that specifies where the entry was created.

fields.name: Global Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the global dimension that is linked to the record or entry for analysis purposes. Two global dimensions, typically for the company's most important activities, are available on all cards, documents, reports, and lists.

fields.name: Global Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the global dimension that is linked to the record or entry for analysis purposes. Two global dimensions, typically for the company's most important activities, are available on all cards, documents, reports, and lists.

fields.name: Source Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source type that applies to the source number that is shown in the Source No. field.

fields.name: Cost Amount (Actual)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of invoiced items.

fields.name: Cost Posted to G/L
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that has been posted to the general ledger.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's or customer's trade type to link transactions made for this business partner with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's product type to link transactions made for this item with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related document was created.

fields.name: External Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a document number that refers to the customer's or vendor's numbering system.

fields.name: Cost Amount (Actual) (ACY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of the items that have been invoiced, if you post in an additional reporting currency.

fields.name: Cost Posted to G/L (ACY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that has been posted to the general ledger if you post in an additional reporting currency.

fields.name: Cost per Unit (ACY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of one unit of the item in the entry.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies what type of document was posted to create the value entry.

fields.name: Document Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the line on the posted document that corresponds to the value entry.

fields.name: Order Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies which type of transaction the entry is created from.

fields.name: Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the order that created the entry.

fields.name: Item Charge No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item charge number of the value entry.

fields.name: Valued By Average Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the adjusted cost for the inventory decrease is calculated by the average cost of the item at the valuation date.

fields.name: Valuation Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the valuation date from which the entry is included in the average cost calculation.

fields.name: Entry Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of value described in this entry.

fields.name: Variance Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of variance described in this entry.

fields.name: Sales Amount (Expected)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the expected price of the item for a sales entry, which means that it has not been invoiced yet.

fields.name: Cost Amount (Expected)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the expected cost of the items, which is calculated by multiplying the Cost per Unit by the Valued Quantity.

fields.name: Cost Amount (Non-Invtbl.)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the non-inventoriable cost, that is an item charge assigned to an outbound entry.

fields.name: Cost Amount (Expected) (ACY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the expected cost of the items in the additional reporting currency.

fields.name: Cost Amount (Non-Invtbl.)(ACY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the non-inventoriable cost, that is an item charge assigned to an outbound entry in the additional reporting currency.

fields.name: Expected Cost Posted to G/L
fields.tooltip: Specifies the expected cost amount that has been posted to the interim account in the general ledger.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 3 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 3, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 4 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 4, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 5 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 5, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 6 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 6, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 7 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 7, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 8 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 8, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Job No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the project that the value entry relates to.

fields.name: Job Task No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project task.

fields.name: Job Ledger Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the project ledger entry that the value entry relates to.

fields.name: Adjustment
fields.tooltip: Specifies this field was inserted by the Adjust Cost - Item Entries batch job, if it contains a check mark.

fields.name: Capacity Ledger Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry number of the item ledger entry that this value entry is linked to.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of value entry when it relates to a capacity entry.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Return Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code explaining why the item was returned.

fields.name: Item Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the item that this value entry is linked to.  Analysis mode must be used for sorting and filtering on this field.
